theme.en: Faith when answers do not come

verse.en: "My thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways," declares the LORD.

es: Día 27. La pregunta más agonica no es "??Por qué duele?" sino "??Por qué duele AHORA? ??Por qué no más rápido? ??Por qué YO?" El "por qué" es insaciable.

Y no hay respuesta que lo sacuda. Dios no contesta el "por qué" porque no puede sin violar tu libertad. Porque la respuesta estaría en Su mente incomprensible. Porque algunos "por qué" no se contestan. Se acompanan.

La Escritura dice: "Mis pensamientos no son vuestros pensamientos." Es verdad atemorizante. Significa: hay cosas que no entenderás. Y eso está bien. La fe no es comprensión. Es confianza aun sin comprender.

En esa oscuridad donde el "por qué" queda sin respuesta, algo nace: la fe más real. No la fe de respuestas claras. La fe que ama a Dios sin dejarle explicarse. La fe que dice "confio aunque no entienda."
Hoy suelta el "por qué". Abraza el misterio. Eso que no comprendes puede ser la puerta a la más profunda intimidad con Dios. No buscando respuestas. Buscando Su presencia en el silencio.
en: Day 27. The most agonizing question is not "Why does it hurt?" but "Why does it hurt NOW? Why not faster? Why ME?" The "why" is insatiable.

And there is no answer that will shake it. God does not answer the "why" because He cannot without violating your freedom. Because the answer would lie in His incomprehensible mind. Because some "whys" are not answered. They are accompanied.

Scripture says: "My thoughts are not your thoughts, neither are your ways my ways." It is a terrifying truth. It means: there are things you will not understand. And that is okay. Faith is not understanding. It is trust even without understanding.

In that darkness where the "why" remains unanswered, something is born: the most real faith. Not the faith of clear answers. The faith that loves God without letting Him explain Himself. The faith that says "I trust even though I do not understand."
Today release the "why." Embrace the mystery. That which you do not comprehend may be the door to the deepest intimacy with God. Not searching for answers. Seeking His presence in the silence.

prayer.es: Jesus misericordioso, pongo en Tus manos mi salud fisica, mental y espiritual. Restaura lo que esta herido, fortalece lo que esta debil y guiame por caminos de vida plena. Dame sabiduria para cuidarme, humildad para pedir ayuda y esperanza para no rendirme. Amen.
prayer.en: Merciful Jesus, I place my physical, mental, and spiritual health in Your hands. Restore what is wounded, strengthen what is weak, and guide me on paths of abundant life. Give me wisdom to care for myself, humility to ask for help, and hope to keep going. Amen.

act.es: Hoy haz una accion concreta de cuidado integral: hidratarte mejor, caminar, descansar a tiempo, reducir pantalla, pedir acompanamiento o rezar diez minutos en silencio por tu sanacion.
act.en: Today do one concrete act of integral care: hydrate better, walk, rest on time, reduce screen time, ask for support, or pray ten minutes in silence for your healing.
